summary.shape_sentence: Bearish shock-drop off the open, V-bottom recovery, midday digestion, and late reclaim that still closed below the RTH open.

goat.note: No visible GOAT marker on the frame; standout move was the opening liquidation into the 10:55 low.

red_circles.behavior: No visible red-circle labels; bearish behavior was concentrated in the opening sell program and continuation into the late-morning low.

green_circles.behavior: No visible green-circle labels; bullish behavior appeared after the 10:55 low, with higher lows through lunch and afternoon.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: No visible orange banks; implied supply around 26085-26115 was tested repeatedly and partially broken late.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: No visible blue banks; implied demand around 25760-25810 was strongly respected after the capitulation low.

time_markers.10am_blue: Active downside continuation near 25950 after the opening breakdown, with elevated volume.
time_markers.12pm_red: Recovery phase underway, price reclaiming toward 25950-26000 after the morning low.
time_markers.2pm_green: Balanced afternoon trade near 26060-26090, holding above the recovery base.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Late-session upside drive closed near 26208, well off LOD but still below the RTH open.

takeaway: Bearish open-drive liquidation day with a sharp V-bottom and strong late reclaim; early panic flush into defended demand followed by afternoon repair that failed to fully reclaim the RTH open.
